title: cleistocalyx eugenioides
intro: Cleistocalyx eugenioides, also known as the Philippine agarwood or Agathis eugenioides, is a plant species that belongs to the cypress family (Cupressaceae) and is native to the Philippines and Malaysia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cleistocalyx eugenioides include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
